meaning: n.[植] 紫薇科兰花楹属植物n.[植] 紫薇科蓝花楹属
examples: The fallen jacaranda blooms form a wonderful purple carpet.
A pair of oxen lies to the right of the hut in the shade of a jacaranda tree.
S? O Paulo, while not lovely, has more shaded jacaranda lined avenues than you might expect.
Wandering the huge avenues of jacaranda trees and taking in the various colonial buildings, you can see why.
Ornamental tree varieties like Jacaranda were also planted on the terraces to provide shade, as well as palm trees and fruit trees like papaya.
